items.headline: Google Cloud Next '26 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Google Cloud Next '26 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (Apr 22)** — Last report centered on the TPU 8t/8i announcement. This window adds the **Vertex AI → Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform rebrand** and consolidation of all Vertex features, Workspace Studio no-code agent builder, A2A production release, Project Mariner web agent, Model Garden with 200+ models (Claude included), managed MCP server, and the $750M partner fund.

items.headline: OpenAI Workspace Agents (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenAI Workspace Agents (Apr 22)** — Last report focused on the Codex major update (Apr 21). This window adds the **cloud-resident agents for Business / Enterprise / Edu / Teachers** (successor to Custom GPTs), as a separate category. Free through May 6, then credit-billed. Direct integration with Slack / Salesforce.

items.headline: Anthropic Claude Mythos Preview unauthorized-access incident (Apr 21-22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic Claude Mythos Preview unauthorized-access incident (Apr 21-22)** — Last report focused on AISI's capability evaluation of Mythos Preview. This window confirms **day-one unauthorized access through a third-party vendor environment** (contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming-convention guess) — shifting the framing from "capability alarm" to "operational-security alarm."

items.headline: Qwen3.6-27B Dense (Apache 2.0, Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Qwen3.6-27B Dense (Apache 2.0, Apr 22)** — Last report covered Qwen3.6-Max-Preview (hosted) and Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (MoE). Now adds the **27B Dense**, beating the MoE 397B on coding benchmarks and locking in the position of **"de facto local flagship of the Qwen3.6 family."**

items.headline: Tesla Optimus V3 mid-show + Fremont July-August production confirmed (Apr 22-23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Tesla Optimus V3 mid-show + Fremont July-August production confirmed (Apr 22-23)** — Last report had "first-gen factory prep starts in Q2, 1M units/year planned." Now we have **V3-generation specs (37 joints, 1.2 m/s) + Fremont late July to August production start + Giga Texas second factory (summer 2027 commissioning) + Roadster / unsupervised FSD slip** all officialized.

items.headline: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness / CLI / skills (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness / CLI / skills (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. **Defining model + system prompt + tools alone is enough to run an agent**, via the Managed Harness (preview), AgentCore CLI, and prebuilt skills for Kiro / Claude Code / Codex / Cursor.

items.headline: IBM Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: IBM Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. Revenue $15.92B (vs $15.61B est), EPS $1.91 (vs $1.81 est), +9% YoY. **z17 mainframe revenue +51% YoY**, Infrastructure +15%. AI demand supports the headline, but the stock falls on Red Hat / Confluent dependency concerns.

items.headline: ServiceNow Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: ServiceNow Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22)** — Not in the previous report. Subscription revenue $3,671M (+22% YoY). **2026 full-year AI commitment $1.5B (revised up 50% from $1B).** Headwind of 75 bps from Middle East deal slippage; stock -12%.

items.headline: OpenClaw v2026.4.21 (Apr 21)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenClaw v2026.4.21 (Apr 21)** — Last report had v2026.4.20 beta. Now the **stable v2026.4.21** with gpt-image-2 as default, 2K/4K size hints, immediate browser-reference validation, Slack thread persistence, and tidied npm install warnings.

items.headline: Simon Willison pelican-tests Qwen3.6-27B same-day (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Simon Willison pelican-tests Qwen3.6-27B same-day (Apr 22)** — Last report had local execution of Qwen3.6-35B-A3B. This window adds an article framing **27B Dense as flagship-grade coding**.

items.headline: Anthropic Broadcom / Alphabet TPU expansion (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic Broadcom / Alphabet TPU expansion (Apr 22)** — Last report focused on the Anthropic-AWS $100B commit. Now we have **multi-GW TPU additions starting in 2027 via Google TPU / Broadcom**, alongside Anthropic's annualized revenue >$30B confirmed as a set.

items.headline: NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform's 7 chips into mass production (articles inside the window)
items.diff_narrative: **New: NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform's 7 chips into mass production (articles inside the window)** — Last report focused on Anthropic's custom-chip exploration. Now we have **Vera CPU / Rubin GPU / NVLink 6 Switch / ConnectX-9 SuperNIC / BlueField-4 DPU / Spectrum-6 Ethernet + NVIDIA Groq 3 LPU — all 7 chips into mass production at once**, with Vera Rubin instances rolling out from H2 2026 across AWS / Google Cloud / Azure / OCI / CoreWeave / Lambda / Nebius / Nscale.

items.headline: CVE batch (disclosed Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New CVE batch (disclosed Apr 22)** — Last report's headliner was OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 (9.9). This window adds **Xerte Online Toolkits CVE-2026-34415 (9.8), Esri Portal for ArcGIS CVE-2026-33519 (9.8), Web App PrivEsc CVE-2026-6356 (9.6), Nimiq CVE-2026-33471 (9.6), Jellystat CVE-2026-41167 (9.1), OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575 (9.1), EspoCRM CVE-2026-33656 (9.1)**.

items.headline: CISA KEV adds CVE-2026-33825 Microsoft Defender (Apr 22)
items.diff_narrative: **New: CISA KEV adds CVE-2026-33825 Microsoft Defender (Apr 22)** — Last report had the 8-entry batch (Apr 20). Now we add 1 more — **Microsoft Defender insufficient access-control granularity** allows policy bypass. Federal deadline: May 7.

items.headline: Hannover Messe 2026 (Apr 22-23) Physical AI demos
items.diff_narrative: **New: Hannover Messe 2026 (Apr 22-23) Physical AI demos** — Last report focused on the Neura × AWS / DEEPX × Hyundai partnerships. Now we see **Agile Robots' "Blue-Eye" humanoid + the Accenture + Vodafone + SAP humanoid warehousing pilot** going live.

items.headline: Toyota Woven City AI multiplexing (Apr 22-23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Toyota Woven City AI multiplexing (Apr 22-23)** — Not in the previous report. Woven by Toyota deploys its in-house AI models across Woven City and formalizes the "Kakezan" (multiplication) approach. Toyota Woven City Challenge accelerator final pitches held Apr 23.

items.headline: Intel Q1 2026 earnings scheduled (after-close Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Intel Q1 2026 earnings scheduled (after-close Apr 23)** — Not in the previous report. Estimates: EPS $0.01 (+92% YoY), revenue $12.39B (-2.2% YoY). Data Center + AI segment $4.41B (+6.8% YoY). Focus on the Terafab AI-chip JV and 18A process progress.

items.headline: **Update: Ollama v0.21.1 stable confirmed (Apr 21)** — Last report had v0.21.1-r
items.diff_narrative: **Update: Ollama v0.21.1 stable confirmed (Apr 21)** — Last report had v0.21.1-rc0 (released Apr 21). Now confirmed as stable v0.21.1 same day.

items.headline: **llama.cpp continuing updates**: Last report had b8862 (Apr 20). This window ad
items.diff_narrative: **llama.cpp continuing updates**: Last report had b8862 (Apr 20). This window adds **new builds Apr 22-23** (WebGPU async tensor API / event API in #22099 series).
